bead.title: Run migration on this repo's beads.jsonl and verify queue operates normally
bead.description: After C5 lands, run the migration on the active repo's .ddx/beads.jsonl (currently 5.4MB) and verify all queue operations behave identically. Commit the resulting beads.jsonl + beads-archive.jsonl + attachments/. Re-evaluate whether the lefthook large-files exclusion for beads.jsonl is still needed (it should be — but archive may also need it).
bead.acceptance: 1. After migration, .ddx/beads.jsonl < 1MB. 2. ddx bead status shows the same Open/Closed/Ready/Blocked counts as pre-migration. 3. ddx bead show on a sample of 5 archived beads returns full data including events. 4. ddx work --once succeeds on a ready bead post-migration. 5. lefthook.yml exclusion list updated if beads-archive.jsonl will exceed 5MB. 6. Commit captures pre/post status as evidence under .ddx/executions/<run-id>/.
